query: SELECT dp.plan_date, dp.id AS plan_id, COUNT(sb.id) AS blocks FROM dailyPlans dp LEFT JOIN scheduleBlocks sb ON sb.daily_plan_id = dp.id WHERE dp.plan_date IN ('2026-05-27','2026-05-28') GROUP BY dp.id, dp.plan_date ORDER BY dp.plan_date;
